Name: Edge 5G Enterprise Router
Description: 5G managed enterprise router with 4G failover. Required component of the 5G Smart Office bundle. Maximum 1 per site.

Name: Unlimited 5G Core Data Plan
Description: Unlimited data plan for the 5G Smart Office bundle. Tiered overage applies above 1TB/month. Volume discount of 15% applies for 25+ sites.

Name: Fiber Drop and Site Installation
Description: One-time fiber drop and splice installation service. Price = $500 base + $250 per 100m of fiber run. Excluded from SLA PoT calculation.

Name: Telco Platinum SLA
Description: Platinum SLA add-on for 5G Smart Office. 99.99% uptime SLA. Price is 15% of Router + Data Plan net price. Requires both Router and Data Plan on same quote.
